input.prompt:
My .NET MAUI Shell app has these problems:
1. GoToAsync("productdetails") throws an exception
2. GoToAsync("//products/active") navigates but nothing visible changes
3. My app takes 3 seconds to start and I have 12 pages in Shell
What's likely wrong in each case and how do I fix them?

input.initialPrompt:
My .NET MAUI Shell app has these problems:
1. GoToAsync("productdetails") throws an exception
2. GoToAsync("//products/active") navigates but nothing visible changes
3. My app takes 3 seconds to start and I have 12 pages in Shell
What's likely wrong in each case and how do I fix them?

data.content:
Here are the likely causes and fixes:

**1. `GoToAsync("productdetails")` throws an exception**

The route isn't registered. Non-visual (detail) routes must be explicitly registered:

```csharp
// In AppShell constructor or MauiProgram.cs
Routing.RegisterRoute("productdetails", typeof(ProductDetailsPage));
```

Then navigate with:
```csharp
await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("productdetails");
```

Only routes defined directly in XAML as `ShellContent`/`Tab`/`FlyoutItem` are auto-registered. Everything else needs `Routing.RegisterRoute`.

---

**2. `GoToAsync("//products/active")` navigates but nothing renders**

The absolute route (`//`) matches the Shell structure but the `ShellContent` likely has **no `ContentTemplate`** and uses a page that's already been instantiated and attached elsewhere, or the route hierarchy in XAML doesn't match. Most common cause: **the `ShellContent` uses `Content` instead of `ContentTemplate`**, so the page instance is shared/stale.

Fix — use `DataTemplate` in your XAML:

```xml
<!-- ✗ Wrong — direct instance, can cause blank page -->
<ShellContent Route="active">
    <local:ActiveProductsPage />
</ShellContent>

<!-- ✓ Correct — deferred creation via template -->
<ShellContent Route="active"
              ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate local:ActiveProductsPage}" />
```

Also verify your route hierarchy actually matches: `Shell > FlyoutItem/Tab route="products" > ShellContent route="active"`.

---

**3. 3-second startup with 12 pages in Shell**

Shell instantiates all pages defined inline in XAML at startup. Switch every `ShellContent` to use `ContentTemplate` so pages are **lazy-loaded** on first navigation:

```xml
<!-- ✗ Eager — all 12 pages created at startup -->
<ShellContent Route="dashboard">
    <local:DashboardPage />
</ShellContent>

<!-- ✓ Lazy — page created only when navigated to -->
<ShellContent Route="dashboard"
              ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate local:DashboardPage}" />
```

This alone typically cuts startup time dramatically. Additionally, move any heavy initialization in page constructors into `OnAppearing` or `OnNavigatedTo`.

---

**TL;DR:** Register detail routes with `Routing.RegisterRoute`, use `ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate ...}"` on all `ShellContent` elements (fixes both the blank-page bug and slow startup).
data.reasoningText: The user is asking about three common .NET MAUI Shell navigation issues. These are well-known patterns — I can answer from knowledge without needing to search a codebase.
